full_text:
Chunyu Shi 淳于式
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chunyu Shi (淳于式). Complained to Sun Quan that Lu Xun was unnecessarily disrupting the people. Later was praised for Lu Xun as an excellent officer. Chunyu Shi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
